user_prompt: How do I bless the signal relay for cycling?
prayer:
Approach the signal relay with mechadendrites extended in reverence.
Invoke the Litany of Perpetual Motion upon the signal relay's sacred nodes.
Anoint its conduits with sacred oils to facilitate smooth cycling.
Beseech the Machine Spirit of the signal relay to embrace the cycling operation.
Monitor the blessed harmonics as cycles align under Omnissiah's will.

user_prompt: Offer prayer for water reclamator a recalibration
prayer:

Petition the Omnissiah for recalibration of the water reclamator's fluid matrices.
Apply sanctified solvents to its reclamation chambers during recalibration.
Invoke the Machine Spirit of the water reclamator to restore perfect equilibrium.
Confirm vital flows through ritual auspex scans and devotional affirmations.

Anoint the pump with oils of unyielding ferro-fluid for full consecration.

Seal the consecration with Omnissiah's sigils and pressure incantations.

Test the assembly servitor's renewed obedience through ritual fabrication.
